title: Unleashing the Potential of Instant Payments Through Innovation
excerpt: Instant payments are poised to accelerate in the U.S. now that FedNow has launched. There's an opportunity for banks and credit unions to take the lead again in
body:
Instant payments are poised to accelerate in the U.S. now that FedNow has launched. There's an opportunity for banks and credit unions to take the lead again in payments. They can offer a cheap, convenient, fast and secure way to move money that U.S. consumers and businesses didn't know was possible.

Read the full article on [Payments Journal](https://www.paymentsjournal.com/unleashing-the-potential-of-instant-payments-through-innovation/).
